title: NO 585Issued under the Revenue Code  with the exception of revenue
text:
For translation purpose only
Official language is Thai language
The Royal Decree
Issued under the Revenue Code with the
exception of revenue (no.585) year B.E.
2558
Bhumibhol Adulyadej,.
Given on the 30 April, 2558
This is the year 70 of the present reign
Tax advantage
The Royal Decree no. 585 is a royal gazette and puts into effect the Government’s resolution to
exempt sales of newspapers, magazines and textbooks in the electronic form (e-Books) from VAT.
